name: Absolute Zero
description: You target a point within a moderate (20 unit) distance and create a 2 unit radius sphere of absolute cold that freezes all water within into ice. While you maintain concentration, make a spell check against the resilience of creatures that start their turn in the sphere. If your spell check beats their resilience, they take 18 cold damage. If not, they take 9 cold damage. As an action on subsequent turns, you can attempt another primal magic check of 12 to move the sphere up to 5 units. If you fail this check, the spell ends.
charge: The sphere's radius increases to 3 units. Creatures whose resilience is beaten by your spell check also become frozen until the end of their next turn if your spell check is double their resilience. If they start their turn frozen while within the sphere, they do not become unfrozen at the end of their turn.
